T0270.title: Volume Scaling
T0270.definition: The practice of generating large-scale traffic through paid placements or artificial inflation to test conversion rates or fabricate popularity.
T0270.description: Black market operators use bot accounts or automated scripts to generate a high volume of clicks, views, or visits in a short period. This is used to test new scam pages for traffic generation or to create fake popularity for live streams and product listings, thereby attracting real users to participate.
